title: Instrument host command lifecycle
summary: Instrument root CLI parse, dispatch, help, error, and handler execution paths without changing stdout contracts.
scope_items: Wrap host main with telemetry run lifecycle handling.
Instrument shared CLI emit helpers without changing stdout payload shapes.
Emit concise stderr summaries for top-level commands.
done_when_items: Representative host commands emit telemetry and preserve existing stdout and exit-code behavior.
CLI lifecycle tests cover help, success, and failure paths.
